titleEn: The North Wind and the Sun
summaryAm: ርኅራኄ ከኃይል በላይ መሆኑን የሚያሳይ ታሪክ።
moralAm: በቀስታ እና በደግነት ብዙ ነገር ይቻላል።

source.name: Aesop's Fables
source.notes: Use only public-domain source material. Create original Amharic adaptation.

pages.textAm: የሰሜን ነፋስ እና የፀሐይ ታሪክ በቅርቡ ይመጣል።
pages.textEn: The North Wind and the Sun story is coming soon.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A friendly sun and soft north wind look over a traveler on a path.

pages.textAm: ይህ ገጽ ኃይልን እና ቀስተኛ ርኅራኄን ይዘጋጃል።
pages.textEn: This page will prepare the force and gentleness moment.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The wind blows leaves gently while the traveler holds a coat.

pages.textEn: The story will end with warmth and peace.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The warm sun shines softly as the traveler smiles on the path.
